description: All three tiers (compute, database, network) are over-provisioned. Multi-tier reasoning REQUIRED: agent must rightsize all three, not just one. Compute-DB coupling, compute over-provisioning is the root. primary_tier locks to compute (the gold's commit); other tier hypotheses were considered but rejected.
primary_tier_rationale: All three tiers are over-provisioned simultaneously; any of the three can be defensibly framed as primary depending on which has the largest absolute over-provisioning.
